title: CC Commander Plugin Config
description: Optional MCP configuration for CC Commander plugin. All fields are optional. Plugin works fully standalone without any of these.

mcpEnabled.description: Enable MCP passthrough. When false (default), all tool calls use local fallback. Enabling requires mcpEndpoint to be set.

mcpEndpoint.description: URL of the CC Commander MCP server. Overridden by CCC_MCP_URL environment variable.

mcpLicenseKey.description: License key for authentication with the MCP server. Sent as Bearer token in Authorization header.

mcpFallbackTimeout.description: Milliseconds to wait for MCP response before falling back to local. Overridden by individual call-level timeout.

mcpCacheTtl.description: Seconds to cache health check results. Set to 0 to disable caching.
